content.en:
After cultivating the prototype of the ultimate killing move, Ye Tian's strength was already above the first-grade Ultimate Realm Lord.

Even if it was a strong man like Mitian Jizun, he could easily kill him.

Now he is placed in the Sea of Dimensions, and he can be called the real invincible in this era, and he has no opponents.

Before you know it, another long time has passed.

With his help, Ye Tian's wife and daughter also broke through to the Ultimate Realm Lord Realm one by one.

Moreover, Ye Tian also passed on many ultimate systems, so that human geniuses had more choices, maybe some human beings were not suitable for cultivating the path of the Yuan Star, and could take other ultimate systems.

And some of the ultimate systems still have the quota of the ultimate realm master, maybe you can cultivate a few ultimate realm masters!

Ye Tian himself was also working hard to create the Eternal Night Ultimate Body, and finally succeeded in creating the Eternal Night Ultimate Body Method on this day.

Subsequently, he began to cultivate the Eternal Night Ultimate Body, but he couldn't enter the Abyss of Eternal Night, and the efficiency of cultivating the Eternal Night Ultimate Body was relatively slow, and it took several times the time and resources to successfully get started.

Presently.

He possessed the Ultimate Body of Eternal Night, the Ultimate Body of the Darkest, and the Ultimate Body of the Abyssal Star, and his strength had reached an incomparably terrifying level.

But he is not in a hurry to enter the ultimate place.

......

Terran.

"Father, I've reached the second rank of the Ultimate Realm Lord!"

Ye Xingchen said.

"It's very good, keep working hard, and in addition, I have to cultivate a few ultimate, so that the strength will be stronger. "

Ye Tian said.

"Yes, Father!"

Ye Xingchen responded.

In order to cultivate Ye Xingchen, Ye Tian even acquired a lot of treasures from the Sea of Dimensions that helped to improve the ultimate rules, and these treasures were superimposed, making Ye Xingchen's ultimate rules progress very quickly.

Time flies.

Countless domain yuan years have passed.

At this time.

Ye Tian had already created the ultimate body method of the transcendent realm system, that is, the ultimate body method of the transcendent dimension.

After that, it took him a period of time to successfully cultivate the Extradimensional Ultimate Body, and he also made his Ultimate Body reach the four gates.

And for countless years, he had raised several ultimate rules to the 365th Extreme Realm.

But all the while, he still didn't understand the ultimate rule.

Whether it was the fragments of the Mishu Disk or the inheritances of those few ultimate existences, there was no way for him to comprehend the ultimate rules, perhaps it was the problem of the Dimension Sea Heaven and Earth, not his problem.

At his current level, it is extremely difficult for him to improve his strength a little more.

Therefore, he devoted all his time to cultivating his son, striving to make his son's strength reach the first level of the Ultimate Realm Lord, and then cultivating a few more Terran Ultimate Realm Lords.

In that case, even without him, the Terrans would be able to stand tall in the Dimensional Sea without any danger.

Meantime.

Ye Tian is also collecting all kinds of strange materials in the Sea of Dimensions, preparing to create an ultimate weapon as the hole card of the human race.

In this way, after countless years, Ye Tian collected enough materials and began to build such a weapon.

But at the beginning, the refining failed again and again, and a lot of materials were wasted.

With his constant persistence, this day finally created a satisfactory blade.

"Eternal Night Abyss Knife'.!"

Ye Tian looked at the knife in his hand, this was not his ultimate dimensional killing move, but a weapon named after the ultimate dimensional killing move.

It's a pity that it still hasn't reached the level of the ultimate weapon, and it can only be regarded as a pseudo ultimate weapon.

He took several of his ultimate system powers, as well as the power that was integrated into the ultimate body, and fused his own flesh and blood into it to enter the casting, but it could only be forged to this level.

"It's almost okay, if Xingchen breaks through to the first rank of the Ultimate Realm Lord, and then holds such a pseudo-ultimate weapon, the Heavenly Extreme Venerable is not an opponent. "

Ye Tian muttered.

In this way, an incomparably long time has passed, and there are more and more strong people in the Terran race who comprehend the ultimate rules, plus Ye Tian has put a steady stream of good things in the Terran Temple, which has also allowed many strong people in the Terran to raise the ultimate rules to the seventh, eighth, or even ninth realm.

During this period, there were Nine Realms Peaks who tried to break through the ultimate rules, but their foundation was a little worse, and they failed to break through and died, but some Nine Realms Peaks were lucky enough to break through successfully.

"Eleven Ultimate Realm Lords!"

Ye Tian muttered.

This is the current number of Ultimate Realm Masters of the Human Race, which has surpassed the Void Heaven Palace.

In fact, the Void Heaven Palace's current heritage is far inferior to that of the human race.

"The stars are about to break through!"

During this time, he often tested Ye Xingchen's strength, getting closer and closer to the first grade, breaking through a variety of ultimate systems to the main realm of the ultimate realm, and comprehending several joint ultimate dimensional killing moves, and the ultimate rule realm is also getting higher and higher.

this day.

Ye Xingchen is out of the customs.

"'Father, I've raised the Ten Thousand Stars Ultimate Rule to the three hundred and one!"

Ye Xingchen said.

"Very good, I'll test your combat power!"

Ye Tian said.

"Yes, Father!"

The two of them arrived at the Sea of Dimensions.

Then, Ye Tian asked Xingchen to make a move.

Thundered!!!!

Ye Xingchen made a move, showing all his strength, without a trace of hiding, he knew very well that he would not be able to hurt his father no matter what.

As Ye Xingchen continued to make moves, Ye Tian also had a general understanding of Ye Xingchen's strength.

"That's it!"

With Ye Tian's voice coming, Ye Xingchen stopped moving.

"Yes, you already have first-grade combat power, but there is still a gap in strength with those old first-grade Ultimate Realm Masters. "

Ye Tian took out the Eternal Night Abyss Knife, "This weapon is a pseudo-ultimate weapon, which can greatly increase your strength (Wang Li's), even those old first-grade powerhouses are estimated to not be able to beat you." "

Ye Xingchen took the Eternal Night Abyss Knife, revealing a look of excitement.

Subsequently, he spent a moment refining the Eternal Night Abyss Sword.

Some more years have passed.

Ye Tian took Ye Xingchen to visit the Mitian Extreme Venerable and several other first-grade Ultimate Realm Lords, so that Ye Xingchen could get acquainted with them.

And after Ye Xingchen showed his strength, he was also recognized by strong people such as Mitian Jizun.

this day.

Ye Tian and Mitian Jizun drank tea alone and chatted.

"Wanfa Jizun, do you want to go to the ultimate land?"

Mi Tian Ji Zun asked.

During this time, Ye Tian has been working hard to cultivate the powerhouse of the human race, cultivating Ye Xingchen at all costs, and has also made many preparations, which is obviously a preparation for leaving.

"Yes!"

Ye Tian admitted.
